central_schemes.name: PM Vidya Lakshmi
central_schemes.benefit: Education loans up to Rs 10 lakh at subsidized rates via single portal

central_schemes.name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
central_schemes.eligibility: Students from minority, SC, ST, OBC, disability categories

central_schemes.name: PM POSHAN (Mid-Day Meal)
central_schemes.benefit: Free hot meal for school children (Classes 1-8)
central_schemes.eligibility: All children enrolled in government/aided schools

central_schemes.name: Samagra Shiksha Abhiyan
central_schemes.benefit: Free textbooks, uniforms, digital devices for school students

central_schemes.name: Eklavya Model Residential Schools
central_schemes.benefit: Free residential quality education for ST students (Classes 6-12)

central_schemes.name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship
central_schemes.benefit: Rs 12,000/year for meritorious economically weak students
central_schemes.eligibility: Class 8 pass, family income < Rs 1.5 lakh/year

central_schemes.name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
central_schemes.benefit: Incentives for girl child education, community awareness programs
central_schemes.eligibility: Girl children from birth to higher education

central_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana 4.0
central_schemes.benefit: Free skill training + Rs 8000 reward on certification
central_schemes.eligibility: Youth aged 15-45, school dropouts to graduates

central_schemes.name: National Fellowship for SC Students (UGC)
central_schemes.benefit: Rs 25,000-28,000/month fellowship for SC PhD students
central_schemes.eligibility: SC students admitted to PhD programs

central_schemes.name: iSTEM Scholarship (INSPIRE)
central_schemes.eligibility: Top 1% in Class 10 board, pursuing science

central_schemes.name: National Institute of Open Schooling Support
central_schemes.benefit: Low-cost secondary/senior secondary education for dropouts
central_schemes.eligibility: School dropouts, working adults, special needs children

central_schemes.name: Digital India e-Learning (DIKSHA)
central_schemes.benefit: Free digital learning content in 30+ languages

central_schemes.name: Central Sector Scholarship for College Students
central_schemes.eligibility: Top 20 percentile in Class 12, family income < Rs 4.5 lakh

central_schemes.name: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti
central_schemes.benefit: Free quality residential education from Class 6 to 12
central_schemes.eligibility: Rural students passing Class 5 entrance test

state_schemes.benefit_en: Rs 2,000-10,000 scholarship for children of farmers
state_schemes.eligibility: Children of Karnataka farmers enrolled in Class 10 to degree

state_schemes.benefit_en: Education loan up to Rs 4 lakh at 4% interest (1% for girls/disabled)
state_schemes.eligibility: Bihar students who passed Class 12, admitted to recognized institutions

state_schemes.benefit_en: Full tuition fee + maintenance for SC/ST/BC/EBC/Minority students
state_schemes.benefit_hi: SC/ST/BC/EBC/अल्पसंख्यक छात्रों की पूरी फीस + रखरखाव
state_schemes.eligibility: Telangana SC/ST/BC/EBC/Minority students in recognized colleges

state_schemes.benefit_en: Rs 15,000/year for mothers to keep children in school
state_schemes.benefit_hi: बच्चों को स्कूल भेजने पर माँ को ₹15,000/वर्ष
state_schemes.eligibility: AP mothers with children enrolled in Classes 1-12 (BPL)

state_schemes.benefit_en: Free coaching for competitive exams (UPSC, SSC, Banking) for Jharkhand youth
state_schemes.benefit_hi: UPSC, SSC, बैंकिंग परीक्षाओं की मुफ्त कोचिंग
state_schemes.eligibility: Jharkhand youth aged 18-35 from poor families
